user.title: Connect to Loxone
user.description: Enter your Loxone username and password. The integration will then scan the local network for a Loxone server (Miniserver, Miniserver Go, Miniserver Compact).

select.title: Select Loxone server
select.description: More than one Loxone server was found. Choose the device you want to connect.

manual.title: Manual Loxone server setup
manual.description: Automatic discovery did not complete. Enter the local Loxone server host manually.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Loxone server.
error.legacy_not_supported: This integration currently supports local TLS/WSS enabled Loxone servers only.
error.unsupported_version: Unsupported Loxone server software version. Minimum supported version is 10.2.
error.no_device_found: No supported Loxone server was found on the local network.

abort.already_configured: This Loxone server is already configured.

init.title: Loxone options
